mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals tighter monetary policy, which raises discount rates and compresses equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate indicates tightening labor markets, which may lead to wage inflation and central bank rate hikes, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal

mechanism_narrative: A rising industrial production index reflects strong manufacturing activity, which signals robust corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production combined with rising housing starts indicates supply-side bottlenecks and inflationary pressures, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls > 1.5% and HOUST rises > 2% in 1 month
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll employment growth indicates sustained labor market health, which supports consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price inflation signals central bank intervention through rate hikes, which increases equity discount rates and leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal

mechanism_narrative: A rising residential construction index reflects strong housing demand, which boosts related sectors and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances despite positive signal

mechanism_narrative: A declining GDP growth rate indicates weakening economic demand, which reduces corporate revenues and leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window
